creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
Hmm,
looking at this link in the light of this problem,
I think that one extra feature could have been very handy:

> regexp:  the sed regular expression substitution clause to use
>          to extract the semantic version from the project version:
>          Example: regexp:s/padthv1_([[:digit:]]+)_([[:digit:]]+)_([[:digit:]]+)/\1.\2.\3/
>          (this example will convert the project version padthv1_0_8_6 to 0.8.6


Yuri
